stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"Would  say it's a simple yet complicated concept? Because the instructions are there, but each person interprets them differently","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"I haven't really played many of these types of games, so the mechanics seemed interesting to me","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"I had a little trouble understanding the mechanisms for it to work correctly","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It's actually a bit complicated to describe the game since the mechanics and goal were simple, however you can see the intentions and effort behind the game"}

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"Compared to the previous game, this one was more intuitive and a little more fun the functions of objects of attraction/repulsion and how they lit up","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"It reminds me of a game with the same theme of clicking to keep the character from falling, however this one can be considered somewhat different due to the lighting concept","effectiveness-rating":5,"effectiveness-free-response":"It was fun, each object had a different function and the color was eye-catching","authenticity-rating":5,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":5,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It's clear that it's a project made with care and dedication it was entertaining to play"}
